## Entities.Inventory.IIngredientInventoryEntry interface

Inventory entry for ingredients.

The ingredientId is the full composite ID (e.g., 'builtin.cocoa-butter') identifying which specific ingredient from which collection is being inventoried.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IIngredientInventoryEntry extends IInventoryEntryBase 
```
**Extends:** [IInventoryEntryBase](./ts-chocolate.entities.inventory.iinventoryentrybase.md)
